description_long: This is a charming brick house with a steeply pitched, red-tiled gable roof and a prominent central chimney. The front facade features a green door with a small circular window, flanked by two shuttered windows and a lush climbing vine. A small porch with steps and potted plants leads to the entryway, and a white metal bistro set sits on a paved patio to the side. The house is surrounded by manicured hedges and a large deciduous tree, adding to its suburban appeal. The rear of the house has double French doors and additional shuttered windows, maintaining a consistent style. The overall design is cozy and traditional, with symmetrical window placement and classic residential details.
description: A traditional brick house with a steep gable roof, green shutters, and a central chimney, surrounded by hedges and a large tree. The entryway features a green door, small porch, and a side patio with a bistro set.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with green door, steps, climbing vine, and two shuttered windows, plus a side patio and tree.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the tall chimney, side patio with bistro set, and French doors at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large expanse of tiled roof, two shuttered windows, and the back wall with minimal landscaping.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view showing the French doors, additional windows, and the patio area with the tree partially visible.
attribute_entryway_design: Central green door with small circular window, brick steps, porch, potted plants, and climbing vine.
